sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Spacecraft Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player pilots a spacecraft (Super Aleste) through vertically scrolling levels. Movement mechanics not documented.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Power System
special_mechanics.description: Ship health tied to weapon level (0-6). Takes 4 levels of damage per hit. Cannot go below 0.

special_mechanics.name: Screen Collision Crushing
special_mechanics.description: Ship cannot be harmed by background structures directly, but will be crushed if caught between screen edge and scrolling object.

tier_notes: Tier 2: This is a scrolling shooter with no documented granular movement physics. Standard platformer physics parameters (walk speed, gravity, jump height) are not applicable. Available sources contain gameplay mechanics and version differences but no quantified movement or physics data.
